landing.title: Parent Portal
landing.tagline: A platform connecting English language centers, teachers, and parents — track your child's progress after every lesson.
landing.heroEyebrow: For English language centers in Vietnam
landing.heroTitle: Parents see what their child learned, every lesson.
landing.heroSubtitle: Teachers record a lesson in 60 seconds. Parents log in and see vocabulary, grammar, behavior, and homework instantly. No paper, no scattered messages.
landing.audienceOwnerDesc: See whether teachers are recording lessons consistently. Track homework rates and student behavior week by week. Manage classes, students, and parents in one place.
landing.audienceTeacherDesc: After class, open your phone, write vocab + grammar once for the whole class, then quick-rate each student. No paper, no personal messages.
landing.audienceParentDesc: Log in from your phone. See what your child learned each lesson (Unit / Lesson / Topic), their behavior rating, your teacher's note, and homework status. One-tap PDF report with the center's letterhead — share via Zalo with grandparents.
landing.feature1: Record 5 lesson sections each class: vocab, grammar, speaking, homework, note
landing.feature2: Per-student behavior rating and homework tracking
landing.feature3: Printable PDF reports ready to share via Zalo
landing.feature4: Owner analytics: spot teachers who haven't logged this week
landing.feature5: Vietnamese / English bilingual for foreign teachers
landing.feature6: Per-center isolation — your data never mixes with anyone else's
landing.pricingLockInTitle: Lock in this rate for as long as you stay subscribed
landing.pricingLockInBody: These are launch rates while we're new. As we add features (email notifications, deeper analytics, integrations) prices will increase. Centers who join during launch keep their current rate for as long as they remain subscribed.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Centers need time to import students, train teachers, and get used to the system — so we offer 6-month and 12-month plans only.
landing.pricingAnnualNote: Pay yearly — save 2,400,000 VNĐ vs two 6-month renewals.
landing.pricingNote: Free 14-day trial on either plan. No credit card required. Both plans include:
landing.pricingItem4: Zalo / email support and free updates
landing.footerCopyright: © {year} Cổng Phụ Huynh — Matthew Stadler. All rights reserved.
landing.footerOwnership: Proprietary software — operated by Matthew Stadler

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains what data Cổng Phụ Huynh (the Service) collects, why, and how it is handled.
privacy.whoBody: The Operator is Matthew Stadler, an individual based in Vietnam, who designs and runs the Service. The Service is hosted on Vercel (web hosting) and Supabase (Postgres database, authentication, file storage). Data is stored in their US / EU data centers.
privacy.dataBody: Center admins, teachers, parents and students each have an account with name, email, role and a link to their center. Lessons recorded by teachers are stored. Centers also have a name, contact info, optional logo, and subscription status. The Service is NOT designed for sensitive data — do not enter health records, identity documents, payment cards, or anything similar.
privacy.useTitle: What we do with the data
privacy.useBody: Store it for the center to view and use, scoped per-center via Row Level Security so no center can see another center's data. Display it to the relevant users (admin sees their center; teachers see their classes; parents see their own children). Generate the printable PDF report when a parent requests it. Operate the Service: routine logging, backups. We do NOT sell or rent any data, do NOT use it for advertising, and do NOT train AI/ML models on it.
privacy.shareTitle: Who else can see the data
privacy.shareBody: Vercel processes requests as they pass through their hosting. Supabase stores the database, authentication records, and uploaded files. Both are bound by their own privacy commitments. We do not transfer data to any other third party.
privacy.retentionBody: While the center's subscription is active, all data is retained. After cancellation, data is retained for 30 days then permanently deleted. Encrypted infrastructure backups may persist for up to 90 days.
privacy.rightsBody: You can ask the Operator to: see what data we hold about you; correct inaccurate data; export your data as CSV; delete your account and associated data. Email matthewstadlers14@gmail.com from the email on file. We will respond within 14 days.
privacy.securityBody: All connections to the Service use HTTPS. Passwords are hashed (we cannot read them). Data isolation between centers is enforced at the database row level (Row Level Security).
privacy.childrenBody: Students are typically minors. They do not have their own accounts — only their parent has an account on their behalf. Centers are responsible for obtaining parental consent under Vietnamese law before adding students to the Service.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By creating or using a Cổng Phụ Huynh center account you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.
terms.serviceBody: Cổng Phụ Huynh is a hosted web platform that allows English language centers in Vietnam to record lessons and share progress with parents. The Service is licensed, not sold. The Owner retains full ownership of the software, source code, brand marks, database schema, and documentation.
terms.payBody: The Service is offered on 6-month or 12-month prepaid plans, paid by bank transfer. Pricing is published at the website and may change for new subscriptions; existing subscriptions stay at the price they signed. A 14-day free trial is available. Refunds are not offered for unused portions unless the Owner agrees otherwise.
terms.subTitle: Subscriber responsibilities
terms.subBody: Keep admin credentials confidential. Only enter data the Subscriber has the right to enter. Do not enter sensitive data the Service is not designed for (e.g. health records, payment cards). Use the Service only for the lawful purpose of running an English language center.
terms.dataBody: Data you enter belongs to you. The Owner holds it on your behalf while your subscription is active. You can request a CSV export of all your data at any time. The Owner will deliver it within 14 days at no charge. After cancellation, your data is retained for 30 days then permanently deleted.
terms.licenseBody: The Owner grants the Subscriber a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the hosted Service while the subscription is active. The Subscriber may not copy, modify, redistribute, sublicense, reverse-engineer, or build a competing product from the Service.
terms.termBody: The Owner may suspend or terminate access if the Subscriber fails to pay an invoice for more than 30 days past due, or breaches these Terms or the License, or uploads content that violates Vietnamese law or third-party rights. The Subscriber may cancel at any time; the current paid period remains usable; no refund for unused portion.
terms.warrantyBody: The Service is provided "as is". To the maximum extent permitted by law, the Owner is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages, lost profits, or lost data. The Owner's total liability for any claim is capped at the amount the Subscriber paid in the 12 months preceding the claim.
terms.lawBody: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Socialist Republic of Vietnam. Any dispute will be resolved in good faith between the parties; if unresolved, the Subscriber's local court has jurisdiction.

login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Parent portal for English language centers.

teachers.title: Teachers
teachers.subtitle: Add teacher accounts for the center. Share the initial password through Zalo or an internal channel.
teachers.validation: Please enter a valid email, full name, and password of at least 8 characters.
teachers.addedHint: Added teacher {name}. Please pass the password to the teacher through a private channel.
teachers.deleteConfirm: Remove teacher {name}? Their classes will become unassigned.

parents.title: Parents
parents.subtitle: Create parent accounts to link them with students.
parents.addedHint: Added parent {name}. Please pass the password to the parent through a private channel.
parents.deleteConfirm: Remove parent {name}? Their children will be unlinked.

classes.title: Classes
classes.subtitle: Create classes and assign a lead teacher.
classes.validation: Please enter a valid class name.
classes.deleteConfirm: Delete class {name}? All lessons recorded for this class will also be removed.
classes.programNoneHelp: Add programs in Settings → Programs to use this dropdown.

students.title: Students
students.subtitle: Add students, assign classes, and link parent accounts.
students.validation: Please enter a valid student name.
students.deleteConfirm: Remove student {name}? All their lesson notes will also be deleted.

home.title: My classes
home.subtitle: Pick a class to see students and record a new lesson.
home.empty: You have not been assigned to any class yet. Contact the admin.

templates.saveDialogTitle: Save current content as a template
templates.saveDialogHelp: Any teacher in your center will be able to reuse this template later.
templates.name: Template name
templates.validation: Please enter a valid template name.

lessonForm.title: Record new lesson
lessonForm.noStudents: This class has no students yet. Please ask the admin to enroll students.
lessonForm.topicHelp: Optional short title for this lesson. Shown to parents next to Unit and Lesson.
lessonForm.unitHelp: Unit and lesson are the short label parents see first. Optional.
lessonForm.vocabularyPlaceholder: e.g. family, mother, father, sister, brother
lessonForm.grammarPlaceholder: e.g. Present perfect — Have you ever ___?
lessonForm.generalNotePlaceholder: e.g. Class participated well; some students need pronunciation practice.
lessonForm.perStudentSubtitle: Rate behavior, leave a note, and tick homework completion for each student.
lessonForm.validation: Invalid data. Please check the fields.
lessonForm.noPermission: You don't have permission to record lessons for this class.

home.title: Your children
home.subtitle: Pick a child to see their recent progress.
home.empty: Your account is not linked to any student yet. Please contact the center.

student.noLessons: No lessons have been recorded for your child yet.

import.title: CSV import
import.subtitle: Bulk-upload parents and students instead of adding them one by one.
import.parentsHelp: CSV with 3 columns: full_name, email, password. Password column can be blank — the system will generate a random password.
import.parentsPasswordNote: Note: if you leave password blank, you'll need to reset it for the parent later (password reset is not built yet).
import.studentsHelp: CSV with 4 columns: full_name, age, class_name, parent_email. Class name must match an existing class. Parent email must match an existing parent.
import.studentsNote: Tip: create parents first, then classes, then import students.
import.legacyHint: CSV import now lives on the Parents and Students pages — click below to jump straight in.
import.legacyParentsHint: Bulk-add parent accounts from a CSV.
import.legacyStudentsHint: Bulk-add students and link them to classes + parents.

worksheets.title: Center worksheets
worksheets.subtitle: Upload exercises, tests, and PDFs for your center. Teachers can attach them to individual lessons.
worksheets.name: Worksheet name
worksheets.uploadHelp: PDF, PNG, JPG, or WebP. Max 5MB.
worksheets.badType: Unsupported format. Use PDF, PNG, JPG, or WebP.
worksheets.deleteConfirm: Delete worksheet '{name}'? Lessons that attached this file will lose the link.
worksheets.lessonAttachHelp: Pick from the library or upload a new file (will be added to the library).

settings.title: Center settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your center's logo and information.
settings.logoSectionHelp: Your logo will appear on the parent dashboard and on printable PDF reports.
settings.logoUploadHelp: PNG, JPG, WebP, or SVG. Max 2MB.
settings.badType: Unsupported format. Use PNG, JPG, WebP, or SVG.
settings.reportSectionHelp: Customise how your center's parent progress report looks when printed or saved as PDF.
settings.reportIntroPlaceholder: e.g. Dear parents, this report summarises your child's recent progress at our center.
settings.reportIntroHelp: Optional — appears below the report title. Up to 800 characters.
settings.reportFooterPlaceholder: e.g. This report is confidential. For inquiries, contact the front desk.
settings.reportFooterHelp: Optional — appears below the signature lines. Up to 400 characters.
settings.programsSectionHelp: Define the programs your center offers (e.g. KET, IELTS, English Communication). Each class can be tagged with one of these so they group on the dashboard.
settings.programsRenamed: Renamed to '{label}'. Existing classes were updated.
settings.programsDeleteConfirm: Delete program '{label}'? Classes that use it will be set to no program.
settings.programsValidation: Please enter a valid program name (1–80 characters).
settings.programsSeedHelp: Adds Cambridge KET / PET / FCE, IELTS, TOEIC, English Communication, Young Learners. You can rename or delete them after.

subscription.trialActive: You are on a free trial.
subscription.trialDaysLeft: Trial — {n} days left. Contact us to upgrade.
subscription.trialExpired: Your trial has ended. Please contact us to keep using the platform.
subscription.pastDue: Payment past due. Please get in touch.

demo.loadError: Could not load the demo. Please try again later.
demo.banner: DEMO • Data may be reset at any time.
demo.chooserSubtitle: Pick the role you want to experience. You can switch between all three at any time from the demo banner.
demo.roleAdminDesc: Dashboard, manage classes / teachers / students / parents, teacher activity analytics, center logo settings.
demo.roleTeacherDesc: View classes, record a new lesson in 60 seconds, attach worksheets, save lesson templates.
demo.roleParentDesc: See your child's progress — vocabulary, grammar, behavior, homework per lesson. Print a PDF report.

superAdmin.subtitle: Create new center accounts and their first admin user.

superAdmin.createdHint: Created center {center}. The admin can log in with {email}.
superAdmin.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete center {name} and ALL its data (teachers, parents, classes, students, lessons)? This cannot be undone.
